mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate signals easier discounting and lower recession risk, which supports equity valuations and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next month when the policy rate is already near the zero lower bound.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward S&P 500 returns are not higher after month-over-month declines in FEDFUNDS, or if triggered easing periods show negative average returns for any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above a recent 3-month moving average marks labor-market deterioration and impending earnings downgrades, which depresses S&P 500 returns over the following month.
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE rising-trigger events are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time, or if the average forward return is not negative in any 3-year evaluation window.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized acceleration in RSAFS and HOUST indicates broad household and construction demand strength, which improves revenue expectations and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if joint improvements in RSAFS and HOUST do not outperform either series alone, or if the combined signal fails to deliver positive 60-day returns over a rolling 4-quarter test window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in INDPRO signals weakening industrial activity and margin pressure, which lowers cyclical earnings expectations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if month-over-month declines in INDPRO are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in a majority of cases, or if the sign relationship disappears for any 24-month rolling sample.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation is falling while FEDFUNDS remains low, real rates and discount-rate pressure ease simultaneously, supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition of falling CPIAUCSL and low FEDFUNDS does not improve forward returns relative to either component alone, or if the average 20-day return is not positive in disinflation episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in PAYEMS after prior gains signals broad hiring slowdown, which reduces future consumption and corporate revenue expectations, leading to weaker S&P 500 performance over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Reject if consecutive PAYEMS declines are followed by nonnegative 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 55% of the time, or if the signal loses negative sign in any 3-year rolling period.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in RSAFS below its recent trend reflects weakening retail demand and softer earnings momentum, which should pressure equity prices over the next week through a faster expectations reset.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS growth turns negative versus prior 3-month trend
failure_condition: Reject if negative RSAFS trend breaks are not followed by negative 5-day S&P 500 returns at least 55% of the time, or if the mean 5-day return is not below unconditional baseline.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-housing-recovery phase, rising HOUST combined with stable unemployment signals broad cyclical stabilization, which supports equity returns over the next quarter through improved domestic demand expectations.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises for 3 months and UNRATE is flat or falling
failure_condition: Reject if the joint housing-and-labor condition does not produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns versus baseline, or if triggered cases underperform unconditional returns over any 2-year sample.
